model_info.blend_logic: XGBoost primary when confidence ≥85% | Blend 70/30 at 75–85% | HW floor below 75%
model_info.platform: Azure ML · Microsoft Fabric · Sapnity AI Platform v2.0

scenarios.name: NHS North West ICS Tender Win — Trimbow
scenarios.description: Chiesi wins NHS North West Integrated Care System formulary tender for Trimbow 87mcg inhaler

sku_impacts.action_required: Pre-build 8,400 units buffer stock — Bespak capacity check needed

scenarios.supply_impact: 3PL capacity increase required at Movianto UK — North West distribution centre
scenarios.planning_action: Approve stock pre-build by 22 Apr 2026 or hold pending tender award confirmation

scenarios.name: Clenil Modulite Generic Entry — UK Market
scenarios.description: First generic BDP 100mcg pMDI launches in UK — expected volume erosion over 6 months

sku_impacts.action_required: Accelerate patient switching programme to Fostair/Trimbow
Increase Fostair production plan from Week 12

scenarios.supply_impact: Reduce Clenil production batch sizes — reallocate BDP API to Fostair line
scenarios.planning_action: Brief S&OP team — prepare dual scenario plan for Apr S&OP cycle

scenarios.name: MHRA Approval — Carbon Minimal Trimbow
scenarios.description: MHRA approves new low-GWP propellant formulation — gradual SKU transition from standard Trimbow

sku_impacts.action_required: Phase out standard SKU — Bespak new SKU qualification required

scenarios.supply_impact: New SKU introduction — 14 week Bespak qualification lead time from MHRA approval
scenarios.planning_action: Initiate SKU transition plan — coordinate with regulatory and supply teams
